backend.changelog: Generate now asks for a single confirmation when an assembly opens with auto-resolved (unsaved) references and proceeds from the current state, even when SolidWorks or the assembly was closed at the start. The BOM item tooltip (EIN | Name | id, shown when Debug IDs are on) is now selectable so you can copy the id with Ctrl+C -- no separate button. Also: no 502 right after Apply Update (waits for the new backend before redirecting). Source freshness unchanged.

cadBridge.changelog: Stability fix: reverts the automatic 'clean session' behaviour added in 1.8.56, which on large assemblies could close and reopen the model, mark documents as changed, and slow Generate down. Generate now behaves exactly as it did in 1.8.55. Recommended update for anyone on 1.8.56. To avoid the revision-conflict dialog on large assemblies, open the assembly into an empty SolidWorks session (close all documents first).
